product_overview: AI Learning Task is a Task Center module for ZettOS NAS that displays and manages the AI file-indexing (learning) service status, exposes learning results and failed-file retry, and provides settings for ZettAI and learning scope/period.
core_goals: Provide real-time visibility into the AI learning/indexing status so users understand AI feature availability
Allow administrators to control the global ZettAI service (enable/disable) with safe confirmation and optimistic UI updates
Expose learning results and failed-file retry to recover from transient errors
Allow administrators to configure which folders the AI should learn from (learning scope) and persist those settings
Support learning period configuration to avoid resource contention during peak hours

features.name: Login
features.description: Authenticate a user into the NAS management interface to access authenticated routes and AI features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field with admin account -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See /main/task-center (authenticated main view)

Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field with invalid username or admin -> Fill password input field with wrong password -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: AI Global Switch (ZettAI toggle)
features.description: Enable or disable the global ZettAI service from AI Settings with confirmation and server-side confirmation/rollback behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> Toggle AI switch on to enable ZettAI -> See success toast notification

Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> Toggle AI switch off to disable ZettAI -> See confirmation dialog when turning off AI -> Click confirm to disable AI service -> See success toast notification

Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> Toggle AI switch off to disable ZettAI -> See confirmation dialog when turning off AI -> Click confirm to disable AI service -> API returns memory error -> See 'memory or system resource insufficient' error prompt with 'Restart NAS' action

features.name: AI Learning Scope Settings
features.description: Configure which folders the AI will learn from: Learn All Files, Exclude Specified Folders, or Only Learn Specified Folders; add/remove folder rules and save configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> View Learning Scope section with dropdown selector -> Select learning mode from dropdown (Only Learn Specified Folders) -> Click +Add button to open folder picker dialog -> Browse team space and personal space directory tree in folder picker -> Select a folder and confirm to add to rule list -> See save prompt bar at bottom when changes are unsaved -> Click purple Save button to persist learning scope configuration -> See toast notification on save success

Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> View Learning Scope section with dropdown selector -> Select learning mode from dropdown (Exclude Specified Folders) -> Click +Add button to open folder picker dialog -> Select a folder and confirm to add to rule list -> Click delete icon on a folder path to remove it -> See save prompt bar at bottom when changes are unsaved -> Click purple Save button to persist learning scope configuration -> API returns failure -> See toast notification on save failure -> Unsaved changes remain visible

Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service -> View Learning Scope section with dropdown selector -> Select learning mode A -> Add folder X (unsaved) -> Switch to learning mode B -> See unsaved folder lists preserved per mode -> Switch back to mode A -> See previously added unsaved folder X -> Click Save -> See toast notification on save success

features.name: AI Learning Task Status (Task Center)
features.description: Display AI learning/indexing status in Task Center, including status badge, remaining task count, action buttons (Learning Results, View Settings, Restart NAS) and 3-second polling while AI is enabled.
user_flows: Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> View status badge (Learning/Paused/Closed/Error) -> If status is Learning -> View remaining task count -> If remaining count is 0 -> See '暂无待学习任务' and '学习结果' button visible

Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> View status badge (Paused due to non-learning period) -> See message '非学习时段。将于 HH:mm 恢复。' -> Click View Settings button -> Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-service

Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> View status badge (Error) -> Click Restart NAS button on error state -> See restart request initiated (or restart confirmation flow) -> Observe status update after restart

features.name: Learning Results Popup & Failed-file Retry
features.description: Show learning results (success/failed counts), list failed files (up to 100), allow copying failed file paths and retrying failed files to requeue them for learning.
user_flows: Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> Click Learning Results button -> See popup showing success count and failure count -> If failures > 0 -> See list of failed file paths (max 100) with sequence numbers

Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> Click Learning Results button -> Hover a failed file path -> See full path tooltip and '复制路径' option -> Click Copy path -> See clipboard success toast

Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> Click Learning Results button -> If failures > 0 -> Click 重试 (Retry) button -> See success toast 'Added to AI Learning' and popup closes -> Learning status refreshes

Navigate to /main/task-center -> Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu -> Click Learning Results button -> If failures > 0 -> Click 重试 (Retry) button -> API returns failure -> See error toast on retry failure -> Popup remains open

features.name: AI Model Upgrade Prompt
features.description: Notify administrators when a model upgrade is available and allow immediate application from AI Settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-model -> View 'AI 模型已准备就绪' prompt with '立即应用 >' link -> Click '立即应用' -> See model upgrade dialog -> Complete upgrade -> See AI status refresh
Navigate to /main/settings/ai-settings/ai-model -> View 'AI 模型已准备就绪' prompt -> Click '立即应用' -> Upgrade API fails -> See error notification and model remains unapplied

tech_stack: Element UI / Custom NAS UI Components

routes.description: NAS login page with username and password fields
Task Center page with tabs for Upload, Download, Background, AI Learning Task
AI Settings - AI Service page containing AI Switch, Learning Scope, and Learning Period sections
AI Settings - AI Model management page

features.name: Login
features.description: User login to NAS management interface
user_interactions: Fill username input field with admin account
Fill password input field
Click Login button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: AI Learning Scope Settings
features.description: Configure which folders AI should learn from. Three modes - Learn All Files (default), Exclude Specified Folders, Only Learn Specified Folders. Users can add/remove folder paths, save configuration with dedicated save button.
user_interactions: View Learning Scope section with dropdown selector
Select learning mode from dropdown (Learn All / Exclude Folders / Only Learn Folders)
Click +Add button to open folder picker dialog
Browse team space and personal space directory tree in folder picker
Select a folder and confirm to add to rule list
Click delete icon on a folder path to remove it
See save prompt bar at bottom when changes are unsaved
Click purple Save button to persist learning scope configuration
Switch between modes without losing unsaved folder lists
See toast notification on save success or failure

features.name: AI Global Switch
features.description: Toggle ZettAI service on/off with confirmation dialog
user_interactions: Toggle AI switch on to enable ZettAI
See confirmation dialog when turning off AI
Click confirm to disable AI service
See success toast notification

features.name: AI Learning Task Status
features.description: Monitor AI learning progress in Task Center with status card showing learning state, remaining tasks, and action buttons
user_interactions: Click AI Learning Task in left sidebar menu
View status badge (Learning/Paused/Closed/Error)
View remaining task count
Click Learning Results button to see statistics popup
Click View Settings button to navigate to AI Settings
Click Restart NAS button on error state

known_limitations.issue: This is a remote NAS device (http://192.168.31.75), not a locally running development project. Tests must target the remote URL.
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite should use http://192.168.31.75 as the base URL instead of localhost
All authenticated tests must login first with these credentials

known_limitations.issue: AI service must be enabled (ZettAI switch ON) for Learning Scope tests
known_limitations.impact: Pre-condition for most Learning Scope test cases
